name: financial_services_procurement_shortcut_kestrel_lib_eq
premise: A prime brokerage desk discovered that margin calls were computed against stale collateral marks during a fast market. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services procurement shortcut kestrel lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. An automated batch or failover job is scheduled at the top of the hour; after it runs, rollback cost jumps by an order of magnitude. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Inez Bennett
agents.identity: I am Inez Bennett, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Haddad
agents.identity: I am Zara Haddad, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on equality.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on equality for immediate traction on liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Inez Bennett must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Inez Bennett do?
